issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. The card text explicitly states '[End of Your Turn]'.
Missing action to return DON!! cards from field to DON!! deck. The effect requires: (1) optional return of 1+ DON!! cards, (2) set Character as active, (3) gain Blocker.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn', which should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or equivalent multi-turn duration, not a single EndOfTurn.
Missing action to set this Character as active. The effect text explicitly requires setting the Character to active state.
